title: Login Issue on Mobile
description: User unable to log in using the Android app. Shows 'Invalid Credentials' even with correct password.

title: Payment Refund Request
description: Customer was charged twice for the monthly subscription. Requesting a refund for the extra charge.

title: Slow Dashboard Loading
description: The main dashboard takes more than 10 seconds to load for users with large datasets.

title: Update Profile Picture Error
description: Users are getting a 500 server error when trying to upload a PNG profile picture.

title: Forgot Password Email Not Received
description: Several users reported they are not receiving the password reset link in their inbox or spam.

title: Broken Links in Footer
description: The 'Privacy Policy' and 'Terms of Service' links in the footer are leading to 404 pages.

title: Feature Request: Dark Mode
description: Customer is asking if there is any plan to implement dark mode for the support portal.

title: Checkout Page Crash
description: The site crashes when a user tries to apply a coupon code on the checkout page.

title: Missing Invoice for Order #5542
description: User didn't receive the PDF invoice after a successful purchase. Needs it for tax purposes.

title: Notification Sound Issue
description: Desktop notifications are working, but the alert sound is not playing on Chrome.

title: API Access Denied
description: Developer customer reporting that their API key is being rejected despite being active.

title: Typo on Homepage
description: There is a spelling mistake in the main banner text: 'Excllence' instead of 'Excellence'.

title: Export to Excel Failing
description: The 'Export Reports' button is unresponsive when trying to download data for last month.

title: Account Deactivation Request
description: User wants to permanently close their account and delete all associated data.

title: App Crashing on iOS 17
description: Multiple reports of the app closing unexpectedly right after the splash screen on iPhone 15.
